---
pagetitle: "Resume — Simon Yan"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.section style="padding-top: 6rem;"}
::: {.section-narrow}

::: {.text-center}
[Resume]{.section-label}

## Simon Yan {.section-heading}

Data Scientist, Quantitative Analyst & Full-Stack Software Engineer


<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--color-text-muted);margin-bottom:2rem;">
<span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Ithaca, NY</span>
<span><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> hyan86652@gmail.com</span>
<span><i class="bi bi-phone"></i> (206) 519-9388</span>
<span><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> linkedin.com/in/sy31</span>
</div>

<a href="Simon_Yan_Resume.pdf" class="btn-primary-custom" style="margin-bottom:3rem;" download><i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF</a>
:::

<hr class="section-divider">

[Summary]{.section-label}

Quantitative analyst and full-stack engineer with 2 years of hands-on experience in quantitative finance and data systems. Proven expertise in multi-factor trading signal optimization, financial data engineering, and production-grade systems development. Currently pursuing Master's in Data Science at Cornell University (graduating May 2026) with focus on machine learning and quantitative methods.

<br>

[Experience]{.section-label}

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
[Sept 2025 — Dec 2025]{.period}

### Quantitative Analyst Lead {.mb-0}
[The Riverside Company · Capstone]{.org}

::: {.desc}
• Led quantitative analysis team of 7 analysts to evaluate accuracy of private equity underwriting models  
• Independently designed core analysis framework, quantifying correlation between initial financial projections (EBITDA/Sales) and final investment success/failure  
• Translated complex quantitative metrics into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders, bridging technical and business strategy  
• Developed MVP dashboard and technical documentation ensuring reproducibility and scalability for client decision-making
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[June 2024 — Aug 2024]{.period}

### Quantitative Investment Researcher {.mb-0}
[Central China Securities · Shanghai, China · Intern]{.org}

::: {.desc}
• Optimized 10+ multi-factor alpha signals (Momentum, Volatility, Mean Reversion) by incorporating market regime classification to enhance signal stability and reduce drawdown by 20% during volatile periods  
• Engineered modular backtesting framework in Python, enabling automated simulation of 20+ equity strategies to support hypothesis validation and parameter tuning  
• Architected automated ETL pipeline using Pandas to process 100K+ daily market data entries, implementing rigorous cleaning logic (outlier detection, missing value handling) to standardize data for factor tracking  
• Synthesized quantitative performance metrics into tactical investment briefs providing data-driven recommendations that informed Investment Committee asset allocation decisions for $100M+ portfolio
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[Jan 2025 — June 2025]{.period}

### Founder & Lead Developer {.mb-0}
[RoomExchange (University Housing Platform) · Remote]{.org}

::: {.desc}
• Architected full-stack application enabling students to list, search, and exchange university housing across campus  
• Engineered modular frontend architecture (React) ensuring scalability across listing management and search workflows  
• Integrated Leaflet and Mapbox APIs to build interactive geolocation system allowing users to visualize property proximity to campus landmarks dynamically  
• Awarded 2nd Place in UC Davis Big Bang! Business Competition, validating platform's technical feasibility and market viability among peer startups
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[June 2023 — Aug 2023]{.period}

### Financial Product Researcher {.mb-0}
[Central China Securities · Zhengzhou, China · Intern]{.org}

::: {.desc}
• Spearheaded comprehensive sector research across Semiconductor and Autonomous Driving industries, producing 3 deep-dive investment memos that directly informed firm's product development roadmap  
• Evaluated performance of 4 target funds by benchmarking against market indices and analyzing key risk metrics (Beta, Alpha, Standard Deviation), resulting in selection of 2 funds for FOF (Fund of Funds) portfolio  
• Conducted rigorous due diligence on 12+ potential investments, classifying operational and liquidity risks to refine firm's investment evaluation scope and distribution strategies
:::
:::

:::

<br>

[Education]{.section-label}

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
[Expected May 2026]{.period}

### M.P.S. Information Science {.mb-0}
[Cornell University · Ithaca, NY | Data Science Concentration]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Relevant Coursework: Machine Learning, Monte Carlo Simulation, Markov Chains, Stochastic Processes
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[Graduated June 2025]{.period}

### B.A. Geography: Data Science {.mb-0}
[University of Washington · Seattle, WA | GPA: 3.55/4.0, Major GPA: 3.89/4.0]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Annual Dean's List (2023-2024, 2024-2025)

Relevant Coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Linear Algebra, Multivariable Calculus, Probability & Statistics, Machine Learning (CSE 416), GIS and Geospatial Analysis
:::
:::

:::

<br>

[Technical Skills]{.section-label}

::: {.skills-grid}

::: {.skill-category}
#### Programming Languages & Frameworks
::: {.skill-tags}
[Python]{.skill-tag} [R]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag} [Java]{.skill-tag} [Pandas]{.skill-tag} [NumPy]{.skill-tag} [Scikit-learn]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category}
#### Quantitative Finance & Data
::: {.skill-tags}
[Multi-Factor Models]{.skill-tag} [Strategy Backtesting]{.skill-tag} [Risk Metrics (Beta, Alpha)]{.skill-tag} [Market Microstructure]{.skill-tag} [ETL Pipelines]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category}
#### Engineering & Deployment
::: {.skill-tags}
[Full-Stack Development]{.skill-tag} [React]{.skill-tag} [Docker]{.skill-tag} [Git]{.skill-tag} [REST APIs]{.skill-tag} [Database Design]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category}
#### Data Visualization & Analysis
::: {.skill-tags}
[Tableau]{.skill-tag} [Matplotlib]{.skill-tag} [Seaborn]{.skill-tag} [GIS Tools]{.skill-tag} [Mapbox API]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

:::

<br>

[Awards & Recognition]{.section-label}

<div style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--color-text-muted);line-height:1.8;">

**UC Davis Big Bang! Business Competition** — 2nd Place, RoomExchange (2025)

**Annual Dean's List** — University of Washington, 2023-2024 and 2024-2025

**Major GPA: 3.89/4.0** — University of Washington Geography: Data Science (2025)

</div>

:::
:::
